---
name: New division / record
about: Request a new state, county, place, or other division record
title: '[NEW] '
labels: new-record
---

## Division
<!-- e.g. "Butte County, California" -->

## OCD division id
<!-- ocd-division/country:us/state:ca/county:butte
     Look it up at https://github.com/opencivicdata/ocd-division-ids if
     you're not sure. -->

## Canonical file path
<!-- Run `divisions path <ocd-id>` to get it, or leave blank and a
     maintainer will fill it in. -->

## Sources you'd use
<!-- Links to the division's official website, election authority page,
     Wikipedia, Ballotpedia, etc. -->

## Why now
<!-- Any specific reason to prioritize this division (e.g. upcoming
     election, missing data for a consumer). Optional. -->
